attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WBPTL.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID               
, WBPTL.BK_QUOTE_NUM                  
, WBPTL.CISCO_CREATED_FLG             
, WBPTL.DSV_EVENT_CD                  
, WBPTL.CUST_REQUESTED_SHIP_DTM       
, WBPTL.DV_CUST_REQUESTED_SHIP_DT     
, WBPTL.CHANGE_IDENTIFIER_TXT         
, WBPTL.EXPIRATION_DT                 
, WBPTL.EXTENDED_EXPIRATION_DT        
, WBPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
, WBPTL.DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER   
, WBPTL.DISTI_SO_LINE_NUMBER          
, WBPTL.DISTI_2_DISTI_TRX_FLAG        
, WBPTL.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID  
, WBPTL.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE      
, WBPTL.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT     
, WBPTL.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  
, WBPTL.BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  
, WBPTL.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
, WBPTL.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  
, WBPTL.BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE    
, WBPTL.BK_DEAL_ID                    
, WBPTL.BATCH_ID_INT                  
, WBPTL.DROP_SHIP_FLAG                
, WBPTL.DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT
, WBPTL.OFFICIAL_SALE_FLAG            
, WBPTL.RU_RET_ORIG_BS_LST_U_PRICE_AMT
, WBPTL.RU_RET_ORIG_CST_U_PRICE_AMT   
, WBPTL.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMOUNT   
, WBPTL.RPTD_EXTENDED_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT 
, WBPTL.RPTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT   
, WBPTL.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT    
, WBPTL.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT     
, WBPTL.PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT      
, WBPTL.PRODUCT_KEY                   
, WBPTL.POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT    
, WBPTL.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE      
, WBPTL.POS_TRX_LINE_ACTIVE_FLAG      
, WBPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE              
, WBPTL.RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUMBER    
, WBPTL.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT  
, WBPTL.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
, WBPTL.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT    
, WBPTL.VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMOUNT  
, WBPTL.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUM
, WBPTL.PROMOTION_NAME                
, WBPTL.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY        
, WBPTL.ELIG_FOR_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE    
, WBPTL.DSTRBTR_RSLR_SALES_ORDER_DT
, WBPTL.LAST_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM
, WBPTL.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT
, WBPTL.SERVICE_TYPE_CD
, WBPTL.SERVICE_BOOKING_TYPE_CD
, WBPTL.SERVICE_BKG_DUR_MTHS_CNT
, WBPTL.CISCO_BOOKED_FLG
, WBPTL.PARENT_POS_TRX_ID_INT
, WBPTL.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT
, WBPTL.EDW_CREATE_USER               
, WBPTL.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
, WBPTL.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
, WBPTL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM  
, WBPTL.LINE_STATUS_CD
, WBPTL.PROMOTION_NUM
, WBPTL.RU_BK_ORIG_POS_TRANSACTION_ID
, WBPTL.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_SO_NUM
, WBPTL.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI2RSLR_INV_NUM
, WBPTL.RU_RET_ORIG_DISTI_INV_NUM
,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT
/* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
,WBPTL.MAGIC_KEY_ID
,WBPTL.NET_PRICE_FLG
,WBPTL.IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG
,WBPTL.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
,WBPTL.REVENUE_SOURCE_CODE /*Added as part of SFP Rel - OCT*/
,WBPTL.GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT AS GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
,WBPTL.GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT AS GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT  /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
,WBPTL.CHANGE_REASON_DESCR  /*added as part of MBR DSV cancellation reason changes */
   /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
  ,WBPTL.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
 ,WBPTL.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
  ,WBPTL.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE  WBPTL
 WHERE
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NBPTL 
WHERE NBPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WBPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND NBPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE =WBPTL.TRANSACTION_DATE)
